segments.text: You have searched me, Lord, and you know me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You know when I sit and when I rise; you perceive my thoughts from afar.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You discern my going out and my lying down; you are familiar with all my ways.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Before a word is on my tongue you, Lord, know it completely.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You hem me in behind and before, and you lay your hand upon me.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Such knowledge is too wonderful for me, too lofty for me to attain.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Where can I go from your Spirit? Where can I flee from your presence?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I go up to the heavens, you are there; if I make my bed in the depths, you are there.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I rise on the wings of the dawn, if I settle on the far side of the sea,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: even there your hand will guide me, your right hand will hold me fast.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If I say, 'Surely the darkness will hide me and the light become night around me,'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: even the darkness will not be dark to you; the night will shine like the day, for darkness is as light to you.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For you created my inmost being; you knit me together in my mother's womb.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I praise you because I am fearfully and wonderfully made; your works are wonderful, I know that full well.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My frame was not hidden from you when I was made in the secret place, when I was woven together in the depths of the earth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Your eyes saw my unformed body; all the days ordained for me were written in your book before one of them came to be.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: How precious to me are your thoughts, God! How vast is the sum of them!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Were I to count them, they would outnumber the grains of sand— when I awake, I am still with you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: If only you, God, would slay the wicked! Away from me, you who are bloodthirsty!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: They speak of you with evil intent; your adversaries misuse your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Do I not hate those who hate you, Lord, and abhor those who are in rebellion against you?
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I have nothing but hatred for them; I count them my enemies.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Search me, God, and know my heart; test me and know my anxious thoughts.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: See if there is any offensive way in me, and lead me in the way everlasting.
segments.speaker: David
